# hetzner_server_order (Resource)

Orders and manages a Hetzner dedicated server. Supports ordering from the standard catalog or server market (auction), managing the server name and cancellation, and importing existing servers. The server is cancelled on destroy.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `addons` (List of String) List of addon product IDs (e.g. "primary_ipv4").
- `authorized_keys` (List of String) List of SSH key fingerprints to authorize.
- `cancellation_date` (String) The cancellation date (YYYY-MM-DD or "now"). Set to schedule cancellation, remove to revoke.
- `dist` (String) Distribution to install.
- `lang` (String) Language for the installation.
- `location` (String) Preferred data center location (standard orders only).
- `product_id` (String) Product ID to order. Not required when importing an existing server.
- `reserve_location` (Boolean) Whether to reserve the server location on cancellation.
- `server_name` (String) The user-assigned server name.
- `source` (String) Order source: "market" (auction) or "standard" (catalog). Defaults to "market".
- `test` (Boolean) Whether this is a test order. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the server has been cancelled.
- `dc` (String) The data center.
- `earliest_cancellation_date` (String) The earliest possible cancellation date.
- `paid_until` (String) Date the server is paid until.
- `product` (String) The product name.
- `server_ip` (String) The main IPv4 address of the server.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) The main IPv6 network of the server.
- `server_number` (Number) The assigned server number.
- `status` (String) Server status.
- `traffic` (String) Free traffic quota.
- `transaction_id` (String) The order transaction ID.
